pi_items.source: ISO 4217 standard: EUR is the official currency code for Euro (ISO 4217 code 978)
Task specification in task.json; synthetic opportunity name created for this task scenario
Company registry: BAVARIA Logistics und Transport GmbH is registered with Munich District Court (HRB 115249) and operates in Munich, Germany
Realistic market data: German warehouse solar installation projects typically cost €1,200-€1,500/kWp; €125,000 is realistic for a ~100kW system

privileged_info_summary: The task configure_multicurrency_opportunity uses verified real-world data: EUR is the correct ISO 4217 currency code (978) for the Euro; Bavaria Logistics und Transport GmbH is a registered company in Munich, Germany (HRB 115249). The opportunity name 'Munich Warehouse Solar Installation' is task-specific synthetic data created for the scenario, and the €125,000 revenue figure is realistic for warehouse-scale solar installation projects in Germany (typical market rates: €1,200-€1,500 per kWp).
